rationale: The plan successfully integrates AM-41 exactly as required, accurately restricting the D33 shared grammar's responsibility to a closed, mechanically enforced module-lexical source profile. It properly enumerates the specific out-of-profile constructs (b1-b6) that must trigger deterministic fail-closed behavior with the 'unsupported-module-lexical-profile' diagnostic, avoiding the pitfall of attempting a full ECMAScript parser while maintaining total correctness over the accepted subset. The original-uncollapsed-component lstat containment check and its accompanying fixture correctly plug the path resolution vulnerability. All prior invariants, including the advisory/non-sandboxed posture and AM-40 package roots, remain soundly reaffirmed.
